issue: Data description lacks sampling methods, temporal resolution, sample size, and observed versus imputed proportions.
required_artifact: Data inventory, data dictionary, station coverage, preprocessing footprint.
proposed_response: We added reproducible source-file inventory and station/date coverage tables for local files; sampling/laboratory method claims remain author-confirmed unless raw metadata are supplied.
needs_author_input: Historical 1989–2024 records, 385-event table, sampling methods, and analytical-procedure metadata if they are not in raw_data.

issue: Preprocessing influence from interpolation, gap filling, smoothing, and outlier handling is unclear.
proposed_response: Each modeled daily value now carries observed, interpolated, imputed, outlier, and smoothing flags; proportions are reported by station.
needs_author_input: Confirm whether manuscript HPBR was based on satellite-derived daily observations or in-situ observations.

issue: Possible 7-day forecast temporal shift must be assessed explicitly.
required_artifact: Lagged cross-correlation, peak-date error, event-onset error.
proposed_response: The lag-diagnostic code is implemented and will compute ±14-day lagged correlations, peak-date error, and onset error after validated TimesFM/Chronos predictions are supplied.
needs_author_input: Provide or generate data/processed/foundation_model_predictions.csv for manuscript-specific D7 lag claims.

issue: Threshold exceedance analysis is descriptive rather than quantitative.
required_artifact: Confusion matrices, POD, TNR, precision, F1, false alarm and missed-event rates.
manuscript_section: Results threshold warning; Discussion management relevance
proposed_response: The binary-warning metric code is implemented for observed-target and all-target verification; forecast warning skill remains blocked until validated TimesFM/Chronos predictions are supplied.
needs_author_input: Confirm final management thresholds and provide foundation-model predictions for warning-skill metrics.

issue: Remote-sensing inversion algorithms and validation metrics are absent.
required_artifact: Satellite matchup validation table and inversion formulas/model documentation.
test_path: Not testable until satellite matchup input is provided.
proposed_response: The current repository lacks satellite matchup inputs; we explicitly mark this as requiring author input and recommend claim reduction until validated.
needs_author_input: Provide reflectance/index matchup table, inversion model forms, splits, and validation outputs.

issue: Title/abstract may overstate satellite and ML integration if forecasts ingest only univariate Chl-a.
required_artifact: Model input contract and satellite-feature integration evidence or claim-reduction wording.
test_path: tests/test_forecasting.py for reproducible local input contracts.
proposed_response: Unless satellite-derived predictors are supplied and ingested, revise wording to state that satellite products support Chl-a estimation/data construction, not direct multivariate forecasting architecture input.
needs_author_input: Provide multivariate satellite-feature forecast experiment or approve title/abstract reduction.

issue: Model theory section is too long and application analysis should be strengthened.
required_artifact: Diagnostics outputs and proposed manuscript condensation.
proposed_response: Condense textbook equations and replace space with code-backed application diagnostics; forecast-specific diagnostics must wait for validated TimesFM/Chronos predictions.
needs_author_input: Author approval for moving model derivations to supplement or deleting them.

issue: Models may learn imputation logic rather than ecological dynamics.
required_artifact: Observed/imputed flags, preprocessing footprint, observed-only scoring plan.
proposed_response: We expose imputation flags and added observed-only plus gap-stratified scoring tables; these intentionally remain empty/blocked for manuscript models until validated TimesFM/Chronos predictions are supplied.
needs_author_input: Cached foundation predictions with target dates are needed for observed-only TimesFM/Chronos scoring.

issue: Uncertainty sources and predictive intervals are not evaluated.
required_artifact: Interval coverage table and uncertainty-source limitation text.
proposed_response: The pipeline now evaluates cached q10/q50/q90 interval coverage when quantiles are present and no longer fabricates uncertainty bounds in strict manuscript mode.
needs_author_input: Provide TimesFM/Chronos q10/q50/q90 predictions if those are manuscript claims.

required_artifact: Pucón→La Poza and La Poza→Pucón metrics.
proposed_response: A reproducible local transfer baseline is generated for context; manuscript foundation-model transfer requires cached/executable TimesFM/Chronos predictions.
needs_author_input: Provide final model execution path or cached predictions for cross-site foundation-model validation.

required_artifact: Mermaid-source preprocessing workflow figure with rendered manuscript exports.
test_path: Node/Mermaid render via npm run render:figure02 or scripts/recreate_figures.py
proposed_response: We rebuilt Figure 2 as a version-controlled Mermaid sequence diagram and rendered it to readable vector/raster manuscript exports.
needs_author_input: None unless journal has specific figure dimensions.

issue: A complete methodology flowchart is missing.
proposed_response: We added an end-to-end flowchart from raw acquisition through preprocessing, forecasting, diagnostics, and manuscript outputs.
needs_author_input: None unless final satellite ingestion details change.
